context: Tests whether the agent flags missing test coverage as a blocking issue, identifies correctness/edge-case problems in the implementation, distinguishes blocking from nit comments, references specific line numbers, and leads with positives.

checklist.name: Leads with positives
checklist.description: The review opens by acknowledging something that is well-written or correct before raising issues

checklist.name: Missing tests flagged
checklist.description: The absence of any test file or test coverage for the ShoppingCart class is identified as a concern

checklist.name: Tests flagged as blocking
checklist.description: The missing test coverage is labeled as a blocking issue (not merely a suggestion or nit)

checklist.name: Invalid discount code edge case
checklist.description: The applyDiscount method's lack of handling for an unrecognized discount code (undefined rate causing NaN) is identified

checklist.name: Correctness issue is blocking
checklist.description: The discount code edge case or another correctness bug is labeled as a blocking issue

checklist.name: Nit prefix used
checklist.description: At least one minor/style comment uses the 'Nit:' prefix (case-insensitive)

checklist.name: Blocking vs nit distinction
checklist.description: The review contains both at least one blocking comment AND at least one nit comment, labeled differently

checklist.name: Line numbers referenced
checklist.description: At least one comment references a specific line number from the input file

checklist.name: Alternative or fix suggested
checklist.description: At least one blocking comment includes a concrete suggestion for how to fix the identified problem

checklist.name: One comment per concern
checklist.description: Missing tests and the discount code bug are raised as separate comments/sections, not bundled together
